style: Premium Diablo-like compact potion slot bitmap frame. Dark stone, black iron, brass edge, small bottle-safe center. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: potion slot frames must keep consumable identity and number labels readable in the bottom HUD.

prompt: Create one compact square bitmap UI frame for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG potion belt slot. Black carved stone frame, blackened iron bevel, tarnished brass edge, dark inset center suitable for a small potion bottle overlay, slightly more compact and utilitarian than a skill slot. No embedded text, no letters, no numbers, no bottle icon, no character, no watermark. Fill the full canvas edge-to-edge; no white canvas, no outside margin. Avoid flat vector, SVG look, CSS gradient look, plastic shine, cartoon UI, bokeh, lens flare, white diagonal shine. Opaque PNG, production game UI potion frame.
acceptance: Compact potion slot texture with readable center.
No text, bottle icon, character, or watermark is embedded.
